notes: Production runtime intentionally remains CC7.5.25 legacy layered loader.
AdminKit Core is still side-by-side and not active globally in production webhook routing.
Core callback bridge now answers callback immediately before Core render/edit to reduce visible wait time.
Core callback bridge response includes timing diagnostics: totalMs, ackMs, renderMs, deliveryMs, ackOk.
The bridge handles only message_callback updates whose callback payload contains field r, for admins allowed by ADMINKIT_CORE_CANARY_ADMINS and when ADMINKIT_CORE_SEND_ENABLED=1.
Non-core callbacks, non-canary admins, and closed gates fall through to legacy handlers.
Sections currently show scaffold/empty states until real section data adapters are connected to Core renderers.
Next migration step: redeploy, verify coreCallbackFastAckReady=true, click Core inline buttons and compare perceived delay plus timing diagnostics in response/logs.
